# Samuel's Portfolio Website

## Overview
This is a professional portfolio website built with modern web technologies to showcase development projects, skills, and experience. The portfolio is hosted on Vercel at https://samuel-pi-three.vercel.app.

## Repository Information
- **Repository**: ngugilovesyou/Portfolio
- **Owner**: ngugilovesyou
- **Visibility**: Public
- **Language**: JavaScript (95.9%), HTML (2.2%), CSS (1.9%)
- **License**: Open Source
- **Repository URL**: https://github.com/ngugilovesyou/Portfolio

## Project Stack
- **Frontend Framework**: React + Vite
- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Development Server**: HMR (Hot Module Replacement)
- **Code Quality**: ESLint configuration included
- **Deployment**: Vercel

## Key Technologies
- React - Component-based UI library
- Vite - Next-generation frontend build tool
- JavaScript - Primary programming language
- HTML - Markup structure
- CSS - Styling

## Project Structure
The project follows a modular structure with:
- `client/` - Frontend React application
- Vite configuration for optimal development and production builds
- ESLint rules for code consistency

## Features
- Fast development experience with HMR
- Optimized production builds
- Modern React setup with official plugins
- ESLint configuration for code quality

## Development Setup
Built on React + Vite template providing:
- Minimal setup for React working in Vite
- Official plugin support (@vitejs/plugin-react)
- ESLint rules for development
- Hot Module Replacement (HMR) support

## Purpose
This portfolio demonstrates full-stack development capabilities and serves as a showcase of professional work and projects. It combines modern frontend technologies with clean, maintainable code practices.

## Repository Statistics
- Created: November 21, 2025
- Last Updated: July 23, 2026
- Stars: 0 (Open for contributions)
- Open Issues: 0
- Forks: 0
